summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by updating the Footer component to use `bg-header` as its background color class, matching the LandingHeader which also uses `bg-header`. The CSS and Tailwind config were updated to include the `header` and `footer` color tokens. No other footer styles (padding, spacing, font sizes) appear to have been changed beyond what was already present. All footer content (logo, links, copyright, attribution) is preserved.
